reviews.review_text: Very small
No ignore (No internet) in here every time I come no internet they give you WiFi but can’t use when I ask counter they say it’s like that happen
Great caravan park. Easy walk to the beach. Friendly helpful staff
Great caravan Park and close to the beach.

Clean and tidy sites with plenty of amenities/facilites and great proximity to a nice surf/fishing beach and estuary with boat ramps and jetty nearby. Great customer service from the team at checkin. Another positive experience in a Holiday Haven park, thanks team.
Great caravan park. Good sized sites and clean amenities. Friendly, helpful staff

Just spent 3 nights on a powered site with our puppies. Sites are a great size and in good condition. Bathrooms were in clean excellent condition. Staff were helpful and polite and we were even offered a late check out. We will 💯 be back.

Such a hidden gem! Went to see the lighthouse but ended up at Crook haven headland beach which was beautiful and raw with an instagram worthy aesthetic. It felt a bit scary at first because there was literally no one else except for us as it's such a secluded place but after half an hour we found a couple so that was a relief! The place has rocky shores & amazing views. There were plenty of big wooden teepee structures which I found had a mystic vibe probably made by locals for fun!

Second stay at Culburra.  Weather was so much better this time.  Overall, pretty good stay agin!

Booked (and extended our stay) on an ensuite site. From check in to check out....such an easy going, can't do enough to make your stay awesome happy group of staff that made everything so easy! Loved the beach walks, birds and the serenity! The ensuites are clean, large enough and oh so convenient! We will be back again.  Thank you HH Culburra. Shame about the daily rain!

Our annual holiday is always amazing staying at Holiday Haven Culburra. Everything you need is within the park or walking distance for fishing and the beach. It is also perfect as a central base, if you're wanting to explore the region. The amenities are always clean and the whole park maintained very well by staff who really care.

Our kids love everything that is there, putt putt, pool and splash pad, basketball, jumping pillow, brand new play park and the flying fox!! All in a very covid safe and well managed park. They're also very competitive with their pricing. It really is the highlight of our year.

Edit.. I wrote the above review many years ago. We have now been coming to Holiday Haven - Culburra for 11 years!! Yes, it is THAT good.

We love everything about the park. Everything is always clean and maintained. The staff, from the beautiful family who run the park, down to the cleaners and maintenance team, absolutely work their butt's off to make sure that everything is running to their high expectations for those staying here.

On top of all of the great facilities of pool, splash pad, putt putt etc, throughout the peak seasons they also have loads of activities for kids and families to enjoy, right here IN the park. The atmosphere here is all about family and fun 😁.  This place is so much more than just a caravan park. It's an affordable escape for anyone and everyone. I'm sure that you'll love it here as much as we do.

So I came here last year in 2025 with my girlfriend and her kids they absolutely had a blast here not only that the staff and cleaners where very nice and made sure that we had everything.

During that week we where staying there I couldn’t have found a better spot on the beach to propose and she did say yes and it was very helpful from the staff here to get everything organised.

But we came back here for the 2nd time I am writing this review as we are back here now and nothing has changed people are very friendly.

We absolutely love it here and would continue to come every year because of how everything is kept no problems here at all.

Thank you to all the staff there jobs will not go unnoticed keep up the great work guys.

Feel bad having to write this review but my husband and I were extremely dissapointed with this caravan park.

After a long day of driving we were excited to arrive here but after a 5min drive to find our booked spot we decided to leave and not stay the night - even after paying 100 bucks to stay.

The camp was absolutely crammed in and we had zero privacy or ability to create privacy on our spot with our van. We are used to lot of people etc. however this amount was too much - especially given the charge of 100 dollars for 1 night for 2 adults in a van.

The camp is kid friendly which is great but what was not apparent when we booked online and over the phone was half of the camp is a trailer park. Given this was not clear from the images online we were very surprised about this. It also contributed to the crammed in feeling and no privacy at all.

Finally, several campers had put up really big Australian flags.

A concluding note: We just came from the most amazing campsite in Eden. Beautiful nature, direct beach access, busy but still relative privacy, facilities, kid friendly etc. We paid 90 dollars for 1 night for 3 adults for 2 vans.

Sorry to sound so sour - we were just extremely dissapointed. Complete waste of 100 dollars.

Clean, lovely park with friendly staff and heaps for the kiddies to do. We will be back ☺️
Also credit to the lovely cleaner who always had a smile on his face and would joke around with the kids. Absolute legend.

We stayed here for 5 nights and New Year’s Eve and want to give full credit to the cleaner, who did an amazing job in very difficult circumstances. The cleaner always had a smile on his face  and was friendly, polite, and happy, even while dealing with situations no one should have too.

The men’s toilets were absolutely disgusting and this was nearly every day there was vomit left on a couch, which is completely unacceptable behaviour. It was shocking enough that we actually left early and will not be back!

Despite this, the cleaner worked incredibly hard and handled it all extremely well. The barbecues were always spotless, which really shows the effort put in.  The park itself is in a beautiful location right on the beach, has great facilities, which makes this situation even more disappointing.

This cleaner deserves a pay rise for having to clean up after such disgusting, careless behaviour. A genuine credit to the park especially considering just how revolting some guests were.

Family Christmas... cabins clean, staff friendly and helpful. Rooms reduced one star as bunk in our cabin suitable for smaller children, not teenagers.

Other family members in other cabins... one had bath, another a washing machine, another a large deck.

If you need internet for work, not best place to be.

Beach on one side, with lifeguards (at Christmas), river on other. Pool, mini putt putt golf, jumping castle, walk to old lighthouse.
Good playground for kids
Located right in front of the beach, you can find a wonderful ocean just a short distance from the gate. The amenities are well-managed, and the staff are very kind. ^^

Awesome place for a family holiday, the staff were awesome.
The cabin was great and the kids activities / facilities were awesome.

Looking to book again.
We really enjoyed our week staying on an ensuite site in our van. The ensuite was a modern, clean and tidy facility and the park staff were friendly and helpful.

What an absolute gem of a place.
I will definitely be bringing my family back here. The staff and their service is one of the best parks we have been to.
Great job Team👍🍺Chris And Kazz Cardona.👍🍺
What a great place for holidays!! Great atmosphere, clean, friendly people.

Great holiday park
Very clean and tidy
Friendly and helpful staff
Wonderful place to stay

We stayed at the Ibis, great room with 2 bedrooms. Beds were comfy. The whole place was clean, neat and modern for a cabin. Very family friendly place with lots to do for the kids. Really chill place for short family stay. Really loved it!

Nice green sites.
Clean facilities.
Great pool and kids entertainment area
Great park for families. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

An absolute hidden gem for families! The kids were in heaven with the splash park, pool, jumping pillow, playground, and mini golf – there was never a dull moment. We stayed on an ensuite site, which was spacious, clean, and so convenient with easy access to the beach. A perfect blend of relaxation and fun, with everything you need for an unforgettable getaway!

Not a bad place to stay. Excellent facilities. Stayed in the Albatross cabin. TV in the loungeroom may need an upgrade, the remote was hardly working. The internet in the area was shocking! (But that was already stated). Would suggest installing foxtel in that cabin, seeing how internet would be a little pointless. Would invest in buying a telstra prepaid internet modem if you have kids with internet devices and are planning on coming. You're allowed 4GB of data for 24 hours per device. Do your shopping in Nowra as well, just a helpful tip.
great place staff were amazing 👌
Well maintained site

GREAT family holiday destination. Cheap prices. Full value! Heaps for all the family to do. Close to beaches and anything else to keep the family amused. Owners are fantastic and willing to help in any way. Totally recommend this place.

Currently staying here and I  have the opposite opinion to Wendy Street . This is an amazing caravan park. So much for kids to do and activities always planned by management. The toilets are always clean. I see about 4 staff members a day either cleaning toilets or grounds and they are always very friendly. I love this park as there is so much to do and definitely recommend to families or couples . We are so close to the beach and sunrises are gorgeous.

Currently staying at Culburra Beach and we are really regretting our choice of Holiday Park. The amenities are absolutely disgusting, even after the cleaners have gone through them. There are marks on walls and toilets that have been there since we arrived but not cleaned off. The cleaner was just in cleaning the floors but there was still bodily fluids all over the seats. The doors don't all lock on the toilets. I have barely seen a single staff member going through the park since we arrived other than the 'cleaners' and there are rude park occupants everywhere. I would absolutely not recommend this park to anyone. Really disappointed considering it could be a great park with great facilities, if it was taken care of.

Recently stayed here on a powered site! The site was excellent with loads of room for van, car and kids (no kids this trip)! Access to beach was right at our site. The only down side was that the only dump-spot to empty our toilet cassette was on the other side of the park and quite a walk! Being we stayed at Christmas Holiday time, the pool was basically chocks block full of kids making the pool kid soup! And the water looked very uninviting! Thank god for the beach!

3.5 stars. The kids loved the park, pool and splash park. We all loved the mini golf. There was a lot of space per site which was great. Amenities could have been cleaner, women's toilets at closest amenities was closed for the first 24 hours we were there so we had to go so far to get to the toilets which is a mission with kids. Overall it was good!
Love this place, awesome capture.ping spot.
Haven’t stayed yet but the phone service is excellent.

It's a lovely family holiday spot. There is plenty to do for kids in the resort: swimmingpool, mini water park, mini golf, bounce mats, playground, and big screen movies at night. Resort has its own beach entrance. Facilities are kept neat and clean.

We recently camped at Holiday Haven Culburra Beach, and it was absolutely wonderful! The location is stunning, with easy access to the beautiful beach, where we enjoyed breathtaking sunsets and peaceful sunrises every day. The campground itself was clean, well-maintained, and offered all the amenities we needed for a comfortable stay.

The staff were friendly and helpful, always ensuring that everything was in order. We also appreciated the family-friendly atmosphere, which made the whole experience even more enjoyable. Whether you’re looking for a quiet getaway or a fun-filled camping trip with friends and family, Holiday Haven Culburra Beach is the perfect spot. We’ll definitely be coming back! Highly recommended!

Clean and safety toilet. 65$/1 night- power camp site. The kids are happy with a lot of activities here. This place is not close to any restaurants or shoppings. You have to drive 5mins to the shop. To conclude, We still love and recommend this place.
The WiFi is very bad. Cannot open web pages. Just the Telstra 4G is ok. Optus is bad signal.
Gated holiday suburban area.

Amazing location just a couple of hundred metres from the Crookhaven boat ramp. Super quiet park. Rebecca and the team couldn’t do more for you even if they tried the most wonderful staff, it was a quiet park, great facilities perfect for kids. I found calling to book was easier as online said no availability. Facilities are clean, the camp kitchen is 5/5 the ensuite sites are great and I love the bath feature but they are a little dated. Outside of that a perfect stay, with lovely staff 5/5 for me.
We stayed in our caravan at Culburra beach.. close to beach and a very clean caravan park.
Classic caravan park by the beach. Good amenties, very clean, quiet, secure. Culburra beach is also a great beach.

We enjoyed this place with good facilities and friendly staff. Well kept and clean such as the BBQs shiny and bins cleaned everyday. The playground and pool are a good hangout with the kids and the access  to the beach is a few minutes direct. Easy checking in and out and communication from Holiday Haven was great. This is our second time here and will continue to do so. Well done HHCB!
Always a great spot to stay. Facilities clean and lots to do around the area
Friendly staff, clean amenities. Great location.
Great place to stay enjoyed our couple of days away. The Cabin was very clean and had everything you need and it was very peaceful and the staff are great. Definitely come back for a longer stay.
We stayed in our caravan for 6 nights, great location

Wouldn't recommend anyone to stay here with the tent. Feels like you put your tent between someone else's house. In their backyard.
However all 3 different receptionists were wonderful and very helpful!
Right up on the beach, lots of activities for the kids and events all throughout the holidays

Amazing place to stay ashame some of the people staying on 23/12 next to us must have not been raised correctly leaving rubbish on site car running half the night next day was all cleaned up by caretakers Kim and co amazing park to stay

What a fantastic place to stay. The cabin that we stayed in has everything you need, very clean, appliances in great condition. Spacious cabin and comfortable for our family. I highly recommend staying here. The grounds for campers are well taken care of. The amenities are clean. The community kitchen has everything you need. The laundry and dryer are excellent. They take card payment which is handy. The pool is warm and clean the playground and jumping pillow are great for the kids. They have a half basketball court, putt putt golf, splash pad and my personal favourite flying fox.
Thank you to all the staff that keep this place immaculate and pleasant for all to relax and enjoy their holiday.
Oh and also the beach is an easy 2-5min walk.

We unfortunately got a week of bad weather during our stay which made it miserable. The amenities are a little undersized for the amount of people. The sites are generous but a little sloped. The main beach is nice and the local township has almost all you need.

Staying now for Christmas 23 break and facilities are not good at all. it’s all flooded after last night rain and no cleaning at all . Pool is closed and staff not co-operative enough to open the facility reasoning cameras are broken and no one is available to fix for couple of days. Not a great customer services- been to other places like discovery parks, NRMA and Big 4 never experienced such issues
Great spot. Right on the beach.
Great staycation location. Close to beach and locals all so nice
Had a great time! Playing put put, walking on the beach and catching up with family.

We had a great stay over the school holidays. The amenities was clean for most of the time, access to our site with our big rig was a little challenging but was fine. Overall great time with the family, shut up to the reception staff and the young cleaner dude with a brown hat !Always smiling and loving life 🤙🤙

Hi Kim and just saying to all you campers out there I totally recommend coming here. I have been coming here for 3 years and this is my favorite campsite of them all. The park is so much and and the pool is my favorite part. It's only a short walk to the beach or the boat ramp plus there are always cool stuff going on like paint pouring, tie dyes and a lot of other stuff.
And all the workers there is so nice especially Jason.

Wanted a quick getaway and Holiday Haven Culburra is only 20min away for us.
Us boys love our camping and caravanning so booked an slab ensuite site.
Online booking was so easy.
Arrived and were greeted with very friendly staff and service.
We stayed Friday, Saturday night and had the free 2pm checkout on Sunday due to bring Holudsy Haven members.
The weather really turned it on and it was nice and hot.
We loved the pool and splash park.
The kids were non stop on the jumping pillow and flying fox.
Our site was just across from all recreational activities.
Just goes to show you don't need to drive for hours to feel like you're on holiday.
Great undercover bbq facilities too.
Will definitely be returning.
Great family Park. Facilities are great. Beach and lake close by.

Kim, Simon and the team were very friendly and helpful. It is a great holiday park, and I will certainly go there again.
God bless,
John
Caravan powered sites wonderful and clean amenities. 👌
